source: Google Business Profile - TotalGuard Yard Care

reviews.name: Kaleb Dresen
reviews.text: TotalGuard Yard Care has been fantastic to work with. The lawn mowing and trimming are always done professionally.

reviews.name: Mason King
reviews.text: Very professional, very fast, and the yard looks great! I will be getting his service again!

reviews.name: Zachary Butterfield
reviews.text: Showed up when they said they would, explained everything clearly, and didn't try to upsell anything. The work was done right.

reviews.name: Will Johnson
reviews.text: We hired TotalGuard Yard Care after dealing with inconsistent service from other companies, and the difference was immediate.

reviews.name: Cooper Brakmanis
reviews.text: Quick response, on-time service, and clean results. The lawn looked better immediately and everything was handled professionally. Would absolutely recommend and would use them again.

reviews.name: Maxi Schultz
reviews.text: If you want your yard done right, TotalGuard is the company to call. Professional, efficient, and the results speak for themselves.

reviews.name: MicoBan
reviews.text: We've tried a few lawn services before, but TotalGuard stands out. Consistent quality, good communication, and no surprises. Exactly what we were looking for.

reviews.name: Sean
reviews.text: TotalGuard Yard Care was solid from start to finish. The yard cleanup was done right, edges were clean, and they didn't rush.

reviews.name: Carson Bloedow
reviews.text: Very easy to schedule and dependable. Showed up on time and left the yard looking very clean. Worth every dollar.

reviews.name: drus tro
reviews.text: We've used TotalGuard Yard Care for multiple services now, and they've been consistently solid every time. From the communication to the work itself — no complaints.

reviews.name: Carter Gebhard
reviews.text: Great experience overall. They explained what needed to be done, gave an honest quote, and followed through. The yard looks neat and well maintained now.

reviews.name: Alex Pedretti
reviews.text: TotalGuard did an excellent job with our lawn and cleanup. They showed up exactly when they said they would and didn't cut corners.

reviews.name: Owen McClelland
reviews.text: Fast response, professional crew, and great results. Our lawn and edges look sharp, and we didn't have to worry about anything. Very smooth process.

reviews.name: Peter Meyer
reviews.text: Very professional and easy to work with. Communication was clear, pricing was fair, and the results were solid. Our lawn hasn't looked this clean in a long time.

reviews.name: Nick Bauman
reviews.text: I recently purchased seasonal a round of herbicide treatment and I am beyond grateful for TotalGuard. They were very prompt on their response time, and did a great job killing my dandelions. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Sam Everson
reviews.text: Had an incredible experience with Total Guard. They took care of me, were more than nice, and the quality of work was much higher than expected.

reviews.name: Barb Osborn
reviews.text: Vance is responsive and the work is well done. They took on a job that others would not. They are also very quick. They have lots of energy. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Christina Kang
reviews.text: Great service! They fit us in on short notice, did a fantastic job cleaning up our lawn, and were super honest and easy to work with. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Erica Singley
reviews.text: TotalGuard Yard Care did a fantastic job installing edging to prevent runoff in my front yard at a reasonable cost!

reviews.name: Max Rucker
reviews.text: We just bought our house and the lawn was a mess. We booked TotalGuard for a deep cleanup and now the place actually looks lived-in. Super thankful they squeezed us in before the weekend.

reviews.name: O W
reviews.text: Very efficient. Get our job done in hot weather without problems.

reviews.name: Bryce
reviews.text: Called for a gutter cleaning and ended up hiring them for mowing too. These guys are punctual, friendly, and very detail-oriented. My gutters used to overflow — now they drain perfectly. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Andrew Lai
reviews.text: TotalGuard came through when I needed help before a party. They squeezed me in, mowed, edged, and even cleaned up the walkway. Guests noticed — and asked who I hired!

reviews.name: blake nelson
reviews.text: They showed up early, worked fast, and left the place looking amazing. I've used other services before, but these guys are different.

reviews.name: Warren Williams
reviews.text: TotalGuard is the only company I trust with my gutters now. They cleaned mine in the pouring rain and still nailed the job. Zero leaves left, no mess on my siding. Respect.

reviews.name: Matthew Wolff
reviews.text: Vance and Alex did an excellent job of mulching our perennial beds, several located on fairly steep pitches. Very professional, careful attention to detail, good cleanup.

reviews.name: Leia Schneeberger
reviews.text: Vance and Alex from TotalGuard Lawn Care are the real deal.

reviews.name: Ka Mur
reviews.text: They tackled my overgrown lawn, bagged, and hauled away the clippings for a fair price. They delivered above what I really expected, my lawn looks so much better. Will work with them again.

reviews.name: Aaron Rogozinski
reviews.text: Vance was great. Handled the edging for my lawn and did a great job. Very friendly and efficient. Will definitely use their service again.

reviews.name: Susan McBryde
reviews.text: TotalGuard Lawn Service has been nothing short of outstanding! From the very first interaction, their proactive communication and reliability stood out.

reviews.name: Kim Esser
reviews.text: Was very happy with my services and have added on more services they offer. Vance and his partner are a A+ team. Job well done! I will continue to do business with them. Great job guys!

reviews.name: ethan trybulec
reviews.text: Totalguard did an awesome job. You can really tell they care about the quality of their work—everything was done right.

reviews.name: Mauricio Roldan
reviews.text: I had them out for a spring clean-up—leaves, branches, lawn tune-up. No upsell garbage, just honest work. It's how service should be.

reviews.name: Sam Everson
reviews.text: Hands down the best lawn care service I've ever used! The team was friendly, professional, and really took the time to make sure everything was perfect.

reviews.name: Anderson See
reviews.text: They handled a full mulch job plus weeding—looked so good I had to walk my neighbor through it. She hired them the next day.

reviews.name: Mason
reviews.text: That's all I want in a yard care company. No BS. Just reliable service and fair pricing. Vance and the crew are solid.

reviews.name: Elmo Slurp
reviews.text: I'm satisfied with the quote they gave me for mowing and gutter cleaning. Alex was very professional when I met him as well as efficient. I definitely would recommend TotalGuard.

reviews.name: Van Ngo
reviews.text: Very quick to response to gutter cleaning request. Reasonable price.

reviews.name: Sarah Quintal
reviews.text: Very responsive and quick to schedule the service :)

reviews.name: Dawn Ziegler
reviews.text: Whether you're in need of a regular lawn service or a temporary lawn mower, these guys will meet your needs.

reviews.name: Brent Hueth
reviews.text: Wonderful service, great team, I highly recommend the TotalGuard crew!

reviews.name: Bubbs Endres
reviews.text: I highly recommend TotalGuard Yard Care for any landscaping needs you may have. Great to work with.

reviews.name: Janice Gehrke
reviews.text: I started out looking in Nextdoor for someone to mow my lawn on a regular basis. Let me tell you how satisfied I am with TotalGuard Yard Care.

reviews.name: Nicholas Heise
reviews.text: Had a really great experience with Vance at TotalGuard for lawn mowing services.

reviews.name: Kyle Garrigan
reviews.text: I recently hired TotalGuard Yard Care to take care of my lawn, and I couldn't be more pleased with the service they provided.

reviews.name: Molly McCreary
reviews.text: Vance did a great job on an overgrown corner lot lawn. He also helped out with a last minute request to help drop off some yard waste bags. Overall very happy with everything!

reviews.name: Tracy Bubbers
reviews.text: Vance was quick to respond to my request, was easy to work with, arrived as promised and did an amazing job with helping clear out weeds and get my plant bed looking great.

reviews.name: Carla Romano
reviews.text: They did such a good job with my gutters. Fast responses and they came over the next day I contacted them. Would totally recommend their services.

reviews.name: Sam Everson
reviews.text: Cleanest work I have ever received. Quote was almost as quick as it could get. They took a detailed look and were ready to go. Definitely recommend my guy Vance.

reviews.name: samisadog
reviews.text: Awesome performance from my guy Vance! Was quick and did a phenomenal job.

reviews.name: Nicholas Holthaus
reviews.text: They mulched my front and side flower beds making it look very flourish. I really enjoyed talking with Vance about his high school athletics and he was a very sweet kid! I would highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Edward Rydalch
reviews.text: Our daughter and her family just moved into a new home and the lawn needed mowing as well as clearing several branches. They did a great job.

reviews.name: Ian Fleck
reviews.text: Total Guard Yard care exceeded my expectations with their professionalism and attention to detail. My yard has never looked better.

reviews.name: Drake Johnson
reviews.text: I appreciate the boys coming so fast to my house to help cut my lawn. It was really overgrown at the time and my back is pretty strained right now. Thank you TotalGuard Yard care boys!!

reviews.name: G Vu
reviews.text: Got in touch with Vance for lawn mowing via nextdoor. After the initial text I sent to him, we managed to get down to business right away.

reviews.name: Leo Lesto
reviews.text: He was fast and efficient and did a great job. He mowed my entire lawn in about 30 mins.

reviews.name: Matthew
reviews.text: My gutters were very well cleaned and are no longer moldy.

reviews.name: RI0T_SAQUON26
reviews.text: Alex was on time to mow my lawn and clean my gutters. I appreciate all the work he did.

reviews.name: Rayna Garn
reviews.text: Very good customer service skills. They did a great job making my windows less foggy.

reviews.name: MarsWKeys
reviews.text: We've used many different lawn care companies over the last few years, but this one definitely stood out to us.

reviews.name: David Harter
reviews.text: My lawn looks great. I highly recommend Vance for your lawn care needs. He is conscientious, dependable and hard working.

reviews.name: Emma Currie
reviews.text: I was pretty skeptical at first but I trusted the process and my lawn actually looked really good. Good job boys.

reviews.name: Nael Santana
reviews.text: They did a fantastic job! My lawn was in pretty rough shape but now it looks beautiful and healthy. Great!

reviews.name: Akshaj Arun
reviews.text: Outstanding service from start to finish. They did an A+ job on my lawn.

reviews.name: Isabella Gitzke
reviews.text: Did an excellent job on my lawn. They arrived on time, worked efficiently, and left my yard looking great. Their attention to detail was impressive.

reviews.name: Luke Field
reviews.text: Fastest quote I've ever received on a job, they went around my house once and gave me a great price almost instantly!

reviews.name: Kyler Wright
reviews.text: Dependable and efficient! They always show up on time and do a wonderful job. My lawn looks great! Thank you so much Vance!

reviews.name: Elon Mcclernan
reviews.text: Highly recommend! They offer excellent customer service and really care about their work. My lawn is thriving!

reviews.name: brandon
reviews.text: My windows had a lot of stains on them and they surprisingly got them all off! I'm very grateful.

reviews.name: Tim Davis
reviews.text: Consistently great job every time! Our lawn keeps looking great thanks to Vance Ferry's hard work. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Patricia Ellingson
reviews.text: Vance has been doing a good job on my lawn for the last several years. Good worker.

reviews.name: Ellie Rossing
reviews.text: They were really fast and efficient. I would definitely hire them again!
